labels.name: rfc
labels.purpose: Public design proposal requiring discussion and maintainer decision

labels.name: help wanted
labels.purpose: Maintainer-admitted work open to an external contribution

labels.name: good first issue
labels.purpose: A help-wanted checkpoint with newcomer context, bounded scope, verification, and a named shepherd

labels.name: task:ready
labels.purpose: Scope, source, acceptance, and verification gates are actionable

labels.name: task:claimed
labels.purpose: A maintainer-confirmed, time-limited claim lease is active

labels.name: task:review
labels.purpose: Implementation or evidence awaits independent review

labels.name: task:blocked
labels.purpose: A concrete dependency, permission, decision, or device is missing

labels.name: task:waiting-on-author
labels.purpose: A submitted checkpoint needs a response or revision from its author

labels.name: task:waiting-on-review
labels.purpose: A checkpoint is ready for an eligible independent review

labels.name: task:waiting-on-device
labels.purpose: Automated work is complete and the remaining gate needs a declared device profile

labels.name: task:available-for-adoption
labels.purpose: A released, expired, or transferred checkpoint has a current continuation handoff

labels.name: task:salvageable
labels.purpose: Useful partial work can continue from recorded evidence and a bounded next action

labels.name: device-lab
labels.purpose: Work produces or reviews a device profile or receipt

labels.name: needs-device:pico
labels.purpose: Requires evidence from the declared PICO profile

labels.name: needs-device:quest
labels.purpose: Requires evidence from the declared Meta Quest profile

labels.name: needs-device:vision-pro
labels.purpose: Requires evidence from the declared Apple Vision Pro profile

labels.name: renderer:ugui
labels.purpose: UGUI renderer scope

labels.name: renderer:ui-toolkit
labels.purpose: UI Toolkit renderer scope

labels.name: role:research
labels.purpose: Source and license comparison duty

labels.name: role:build
labels.purpose: Implementation and test duty

labels.name: role:review
labels.purpose: Independent review duty

labels.name: role:device-test
labels.purpose: Device procedure and receipt duty

labels.name: role:integration
labels.purpose: Fan-in, migration, release-readiness, and closure duty

labels.name: role:documentation
labels.purpose: Public guidance, examples, and knowledge-maintenance duty

labels.name: security-boundary
labels.purpose: Permission, workflow, secret, or untrusted-input review required
